gates.name: Effective Isp within declared envelope
gates.detail: S1 avg Isp 303.1 s (env 282–311); S2 342.2 s (declared 348, fairing-jettison bookkeeping)

gates.name: Mass bookkeeping exact
gates.detail: staging drop 58,000 kg (=58,000); final 37,192 kg (=37,200 physics convention w/ fairing jettison; 39,000 w/ fairing kept)

gates.name: Ascent profile inside real-flight family bands
gates.detail: MECO Mach 5.7 @ 66.5 km; Max-Q Mach 1.41 @ t+70 s, 11.0 km (F9-class references: MECO Mach 5.7–6.3/65–75 km, Max-Q ~T+70–80 s)

gates.name: Max-Q measured (counter-M-3)
gates.detail: Q_max = 31.2 kPa @ t+70 s / 11.0 km / Mach 1.41 — vs Day-5 claim 28 kPa@12–15 km vs Day-5 own data 40.4 kPa@9.3 km

gates.name: S2 Δv ≤ Tsiolkovsky bound (energy honesty)
gates.detail: S2 thrust-work Δv 4662 m/s ≤ ideal 4740 m/s (old sim gained 5080 m/s vs its own bound ~4,620 → phantom energy)

gates.name: Orbit state & deficit quantified (counter-C-2)
gates.detail: SECO 78 km / 5863 m/s → perigee -3823 km; deficit to 500×500 = 2125 m/s (documented design does NOT close; honest number, no patching)

gates.name: Energy balance closes (thrust − losses = final v)
gates.detail: thrust 7797 − grav 1912 − drag 18 = 5867 vs final v 5863 m/s (residual 3 from steering projection)

gates.name: Axial acceleration < 5 g path constraint
gates.detail: max sensed accel 4.09 g (limit 5 g; no throttle-down needed)
